tossups.question: This character admits “I am unknowing” after being asked to reveal his secrets, right after interrupting a meal of strawberries and milk shared between Mia, Josef, and their temporary bodyguard. A squirrel jumps onto a stump this character has cut down, right after a fake-bearded jester named Skat hides in a tree after theatrically faking his suicide. This character momentarily disguises himself as a monk who has broken the hands of a prisoner right before their execution. He claims (*) “nothing escapes me” after a theologian collapses after raving about the plague in a forest clearing. Antonius Block announces “my flesh is afraid, but I am not” when this character first fades into view on a rocky beach. For 10 points, name this character played by Gunnar Björnstrand, who states “it becomes me well” after picking black in a game of chess in an Ingmar Bergman film.
tossups.question_sanitized: This character admits "I am unknowing" after being asked to reveal his secrets, right after interrupting a meal of strawberries and milk shared between Mia, Josef, and their temporary bodyguard. A squirrel jumps onto a stump this character has cut down, right after a fake-bearded jester named Skat hides in a tree after theatrically faking his suicide. This character momentarily disguises himself as a monk who has broken the hands of a prisoner right before their execution. He claims (*) "nothing escapes me" after a theologian collapses after raving about the plague in a forest clearing. Antonius Block announces "my flesh is afraid, but I am not" when this character first fades into view on a rocky beach. For 10 points, name this character played by Gunnar Bjornstrand, who states "it becomes me well" after picking black in a game of chess in an Ingmar Bergman film.
tossups.answer_sanitized: Death in The Seventh Seal [or Doden]

tossups.question: In a film titled for one of these things, Miklós asks János (“YAH-nohss”) whether he’d rather be the cruel ruler of the island of Lucs-Lucs or a slave named Gyugyu who is horribly mistreated but is comforted by his clean conscience. In a film titled for one of these things, a vision of people who “move away from the dawn … while the rain cleanses the cheeks of the salt from their bitter tears” is described by an actor who is mocked by his wife (*) Mia. A film titled for one of these things includes a thief named Raval who dies during a plague, and ends with a hillside Danse Macabre (“dahnss muh-KAHB”) that features a knight who had previously played chess with Death. For 10 points, an Ingmar Bergman film is titled for the seventh of what items from the Book of Revelation?
tossups.answer: the seven seals [accept The Fifth Seal; accept The Seventh Seal; accept Az ötödik pecsét; accept Det sjunde inseglet]
tossups.answer_sanitized: the seven seals [accept The Fifth Seal; accept The Seventh Seal; accept Az otodik pecset; accept Det sjunde inseglet]
tossups.question_sanitized: In a film titled for one of these things, Miklos asks Janos ("YAH-nohss") whether he'd rather be the cruel ruler of the island of Lucs-Lucs or a slave named Gyugyu who is horribly mistreated but is comforted by his clean conscience. In a film titled for one of these things, a vision of people who "move away from the dawn ... while the rain cleanses the cheeks of the salt from their bitter tears" is described by an actor who is mocked by his wife (*) Mia. A film titled for one of these things includes a thief named Raval who dies during a plague, and ends with a hillside Danse Macabre ("dahnss muh-KAHB") that features a knight who had previously played chess with Death. For 10 points, an Ingmar Bergman film is titled for the seventh of what items from the Book of Revelation?

tossups.question: In this film, sunlight shines onto the body of a man the moment he drops dead after writhing on the ground begging for water. In this film, a squirrel hops onto the stump of a tree that had just been cut down, which killed the man hiding in it. After a character in this film gives a painkilling drug to a girl, his friend remarks that the girl’s eyes can see nothing but “emptiness under the moon.” A character in this film mistakenly reveals his strategy at a (*) confession, and then decides to guide a traveling troupe of actors whose performance had been interrupted by a procession of flagellants. Jof and Mia escape the plague at this film’s end and witness a group of dancing figures on a hill. For 10 points, name this Ingmar Bergman film about the knight Antonius Block and his chess match with Death.
tossups.answer_sanitized: The Seventh Seal [or Det sjunde inseglet]
tossups.question_sanitized: In this film, sunlight shines onto the body of a man the moment he drops dead after writhing on the ground begging for water. In this film, a squirrel hops onto the stump of a tree that had just been cut down, which killed the man hiding in it. After a character in this film gives a painkilling drug to a girl, his friend remarks that the girl's eyes can see nothing but "emptiness under the moon." A character in this film mistakenly reveals his strategy at a (*) confession, and then decides to guide a traveling troupe of actors whose performance had been interrupted by a procession of flagellants. Jof and Mia escape the plague at this film's end and witness a group of dancing figures on a hill. For 10 points, name this Ingmar Bergman film about the knight Antonius Block and his chess match with Death.

bonuses.leadin: When this character goes to a confessional, the camera reveals that the ‘priest’ is actually his chess opponent. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this character portrayed by Max von Sydow. After returning from the crusades, this character challenges Death to a game of chess in order to prolong his life in an Ingmar Bergman film.

In this Stanley Kubrick film, astronaut Frank Poole resigns his chess game against the seemingly infallible computer HAL 9000. Later in this film, David Bowman becomes the Star Child after encountering a black monolith.

In this director’s The Chess Players, two nobles become so obsessed with the game that they ignore the impending British takeover of their territory. This protégé of Jean Renoir also directed Pather Panchali, which is the first entry in his Apu trilogy.
answers_sanitized: Antonius Block [accept either underlined part] (From The Seventh Seal)
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: When this character goes to a confessional, the camera reveals that the 'priest' is actually his chess opponent. For 10 points each:
parts_sanitized: Name this character portrayed by Max von Sydow. After returning from the crusades, this character challenges Death to a game of chess in order to prolong his life in an Ingmar Bergman film.

In this Stanley Kubrick film, astronaut Frank Poole resigns his chess game against the seemingly infallible computer HAL 9000. Later in this film, David Bowman becomes the Star Child after encountering a black monolith.

In this director's The Chess Players, two nobles become so obsessed with the game that they ignore the impending British takeover of their territory. This protege of Jean Renoir also directed Pather Panchali, which is the first entry in his Apu trilogy.

bonuses.leadin: Depictions of the Danse Macabre motif are not unique to classical music. For 10 points each:
parts: In this film, Antonius Block visits a church where a dance of death fresco is being painted. In the final scene of this Ingmar Bergman film, Jof (yoff) watches as Block and his followers recreate that fresco.
This artist depicted an abbot being pulled away by a skeleton in one work from his series of woodcuts The Dance of Death.
answers_sanitized: The Seventh Seal [accept Det sjunde inseglet]
bonuses.leadin_sanitized: Depictions of the Danse Macabre motif are not unique to classical music. For 10 points each:
parts_sanitized: In this film, Antonius Block visits a church where a dance of death fresco is being painted. In the final scene of this Ingmar Bergman film, Jof (yoff) watches as Block and his followers recreate that fresco.
This artist depicted an abbot being pulled away by a skeleton in one work from his series of woodcuts The Dance of Death.

bonuses.leadin: Members of this religion added the suffix “-ody” to their names, and the goal of this faith was to become “Next Level”, which required abandoning all ties to Earth. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this New Age religion whose followers left Earth via a spacecraft trailing Comet Hale-Bopp after they committed mass suicide in 1997.
Heaven’s Gate was founded by this man, who had a religious awakening following a near-death experience in the early 1970’s.

Applewhite believed that he was one of the “two witnesses” mentioned in Chapter 11 of the Book of Revelation, which more famously predicts this event. After this event, the Kingdom of God will be proclaimed on Earth and the Ark of the Covenant will appear in the Temple. It is preceded by several similar events whose purpose is to warn sinners to repent.
answers: the seventh trumpet [do not accept seventh seal]
answers_sanitized: the seventh trumpet [do not accept seventh seal]
